Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state, bs.applicability, up.applicability AS applicability_1 FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade = 1 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4c344cd6669332632a5a34e088f84efa766fbe8e33a490a3fe45c30d8844d457/82b86262-43f1-42e3-b640-3dcf5100d72f/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
